scope: Incident closure plus projection verification after 2UID Live QA failure. No new Binance private reads were made in this closure except previously completed UID147 evidence reuse; UID154 remains local-only.

incidentSummary.userSymptom: Live QA audit stopped; Binance signed reads returned HTTP 418 and further lifecycle proof could not be closed.
incidentSummary.affected: UID147/UID154 audit harness, not a single PID
incidentSummary.directCause: Private read probes continued after 429 instead of stopping on rate-limit/cooldown.
incidentSummary.codeHarnessCause: Prior audit path repeated signed position/order/trade/readiness calls instead of one UID+symbol+window bulk read with circuit breaker.
incidentSummary.fixApplied: a102eb3 read guard: per-endpoint counters, UID/window cache, 429 backoff, 418 circuit breaker, Retry-After respect, UID154 private hard-stop.
incidentSummary.verification: binance-read-guard-static-test PASS; previous low-rate UID147 call count public=1 private=10 UID154 private=0.
incidentSummary.remainingLimit: Do not run repeated live-readonly or PID-level private reads while IP/account is cooling down.

incidentSummary.userSymptom: Report temporarily showed Binance-open/local-flat style confusion under failed reads.
incidentSummary.directCause: A failed exchange read could be consumed by projection/sync as if empty exchange state was authoritative.
incidentSummary.codeHarnessCause: Read failure and confirmed flat were not hard-separated in the truth-sync gate.
incidentSummary.fixApplied: a703c6c blocks truth sync/local mutation on Binance read failure and keeps current risk visible instead of coercing qty to 0.
incidentSummary.verification: Canonical review PASS; failed read no longer terminalizes ledger/snapshot/reservation.
incidentSummary.remainingLimit: When Binance read fails, report remains limited; it must not be promoted to exchange-flat proof.

incidentSummary.userSymptom: Local GRID_TP PARTIAL reservation appeared unmatched after manual cleanup.
incidentSummary.directCause: Reservation projection was stale after Binance order 4254544316 had already FILLED.
incidentSummary.codeHarnessCause: Reservation terminalization did not have a safe owner-scoped helper for exchange evidence already reflected in ledger.
incidentSummary.fixApplied: 4f03512 markReservationFilledFromExchangeEvidence: PARTIAL -> FILLED, filledQty 13668 -> 14318; no extra ledger/PnL.
incidentSummary.verification: Binance order FILLED, tradeIds 220347363/220347364 already existed in ledger, active reservations now 0.

incidentSummary.userSymptom: jhkim could not be Binance-source rechecked from current IP; stale local TP needed review.
incidentSummary.directCause: Local stale TP remained after local owner-close evidence showed position closed.
incidentSummary.codeHarnessCause: No safe local-only terminalization path for owner-close evidence when Binance private read is forbidden.
incidentSummary.fixApplied: 4f03512 terminalizeStaleReservationsAfterOwnerClose: CANCEL_PENDING -> CANCELED based on GMANUAL_L_154_992319_59210170 and ledger exit tradeId 3099498040.
incidentSummary.verification: UID154 local open snapshots 0, active reservations 0, PID enabled 0; UID154 private API calls 0.
incidentSummary.remainingLimit: UID154 is LOCAL_ONLY_BINANCE_UNVERIFIED, not Binance-source PASS.

incidentSummary.userSymptom: 0.00% 반복, 진행중 누락, 확인필요 과다, 승패/최근거래/가격 수신중 혼란.
incidentSummary.affected: UID147 and UID154 user Track Record/PID tables/admin projection
incidentSummary.directCause: Resolved historical issue labels leaked into completed rows; null denominator could be rendered too close to fake 0; labels/copy made current status ambiguous.
incidentSummary.codeHarnessCause: Track Record list reused processRow summaryStatus/issue labels even when needsReview=false.
incidentSummary.fixApplied: routes/admin.js now clears issue labels unless current actionable review; completed summaryStatusLabel becomes 성과 기록. Frontend shows null PnL/returnPct as 계산 불가 and uses public price estimate labels.
incidentSummary.verification: In-memory API smoke with Redis stub: UID147 completed=25 active=0 review=0; UID154 completed=15 active=0 review=0; first completed rows issueLabel=null, summaryStatusLabel=성과 기록. frontend build PASS.
incidentSummary.remainingLimit: Browser plugin backend was unavailable; API smoke and production build were used instead of visual browser click-through.

incidentSummary.userSymptom: Grid stats TradingView payloads were rejected with 400; latest/rankings were stale.
incidentSummary.directCause: Parser rejected TradingView payload variants: .4/.5 TP keys and null no-data period.
incidentSummary.codeHarnessCause: Stats parser contract was too strict and old rejected rows were not backfilled into stats-only tables.
incidentSummary.fixApplied: a102eb3 tolerant parser plus new stats-only backfill tool converted rejected raw ids 8,9,10,11,12,13,15.
incidentSummary.verification: Each converted row metrics=60 bestcases=5; /user/api/stats/grid/latest status 200 rows=10; rankings status 200 rows=6; latest calculatedAt 2026-05-03T04:04:33Z.
incidentSummary.remainingLimit: strategy_stats_raw id 7 remains correctly invalid because matrix is empty.
